title: France Vehicle Registration Certificate Application (Cerfa 13750*07, Certificat d'immatriculation)
description: Apply for, or amend, a French vehicle registration certificate (certificat d'immatriculation, historically called the carte grise) using Cerfa form 13750*07: first-time issue, duplicate, correction, change of the holder's address or civil status, or a change to the vehicle's recorded technical characteristics. Since the 2017 reform, French vehicle-registration formalities are handled online (ANTS's Système d'Immatriculation des Véhicules, immatriculation.ants.gouv.fr, or an approved professional intermediary such as a dealer or registration agent) rather than at a prefecture counter, but the same Cerfa 13750 field set underlies both the paper form and the online service's own data entry. This document models the printed form's own field set (holder, co-holder, lessor/lessee, and vehicle description) rather than the online portal's screen-by-screen flow, which sits behind an authenticated FranceConnect/professional-account session this review could not reach — see VERIFICATION.md.

authority.name: Agence Nationale des Titres Sécurisés (national vehicle registration system operator) / Ministère de l'Intérieur

source.documentRef: Cerfa 13750*07 — 'Demande de certificat d'immatriculation d'un véhicule' (Articles R. 322-1 et suivants du code de la route), published via service-public.fr / Direction de l'information légale et administrative (DILA); form PDF cross-referenced from the DILA-hosted Cerfa mirror and matched by form number/edition against multiple independent mirrors (eplaque.fr, cartegrise.com, préfecture de l'Hérault).

verification.notes: Authored directly from the official Cerfa 13750*07 PDF's own printed text (extracted with pdfjs-dist getTextContent, position-sorted — the PDF carries no AcroForm/Widget annotations, a static print-and-sign form like AU's NAT 2541 and DE's ESt 1 A), cross-checked against service-public.fr's own guidance page for the form (process steps, required supporting documents, and the Cerfa number/edition). The live online submission channel (ANTS's immatriculation.ants.gouv.fr Système d'Immatriculation des Véhicules) requires an authenticated FranceConnect or professional account this review could not reach, so the field-by-field comparison the practice requires has not been completed against that live screen set — status remains draft. v2.0.0 adds the previously-missed `titleRecipient` field (a distinct checkbox row selecting who receives the certificate, found during GOV-744 review) — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: procedureType
fields.label: What are you requesting?
fields.description: certificat = first-time issue of a registration certificate for this vehicle; duplicata = duplicate of a lost/stolen/damaged certificate; correction = correction of an error on the certificate; changement_domicile = the holder's change of address; changement_etat_civil = change of civil/marital status; changement_caracteristiques_techniques = change to the vehicle's recorded technical characteristics.
fields.sourceRef: 'Veuillez cocher la case correspondante : Certificat / Duplicata / Correction / Changement de domicile / Changement d'état civil ou d'état matrimonial / Changement des caractéristiques techniques du véhicule'

fields.name: currentRegistrationNumber
fields.label: (A) Current registration number
fields.description: Left blank when this is the first-ever registration of a vehicle that has never previously been issued a French plate.

fields.name: certificateFormNumber
fields.label: Certificate form (formule) number
fields.description: Only applicable to the new-format certificate; printed on page 1 of the current certificate under the heading 'Certificat d'immatriculation'.
fields.sourceRef: 'Numéro de formule * du certificat d'immatriculation (si nouveau format d'immatriculation. Ce numéro figure sur la 1re page du certificat actuel sous la mention « Certificat d'immatriculation »)'

fields.name: dominantColor
fields.label: Dominant colour (COULEUR DOMINANTE)
fields.sourceRef: 'COULEUR DOMINANTE (Veuillez cocher les cases correspondantes)' — Noir / Jaune / Gris / Marron / Vert / Blanc / Rouge / Bleu / Orange / Beige

fields.name: colorShade
fields.label: Colour shade (Clair / Foncé), if applicable
fields.description: A separate light/dark shade checkbox pair printed alongside the ten named colours; the form's own layout does not confirm whether it pairs with one specific colour swatch or is a free-standing modifier, so it is modelled here as an independent optional field — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: 'Clair' / 'Foncé' checkboxes in the COULEUR DOMINANTE block

fields.name: commercialDenomination
fields.label: Commercial denomination / model (Dénomination commerciale, code D.3)

fields.name: vehicleIdentificationNumber
fields.label: Vehicle identification number (Numéro d'identification du véhicule, code E)

fields.name: nationalVehicleCategory
fields.label: National vehicle category (Genre national, code J.1)

fields.name: rentalArrangement
fields.label: Is the vehicle rented or leased?
fields.description: not_applicable = the vehicle is not being placed into a rental/leasing arrangement; long_term_rental = location longue durée; short_term_rental = location courte durée; finance_lease = crédit-bail. Determines whether a LOUEUR (lessor) and/or LOCATAIRE (lessee) block must also be completed.
fields.sourceRef: 'Si véhicule pris en location, cocher la case correspondante : Véhicule en location longue durée / en location courte durée / en crédit-bail'

fields.name: holderEntityType
fields.label: Holder (TITULAIRE) — applicant type
fields.sourceRef: 'TITULAIRE — Personne physique ou entreprise individuelle' / 'Personne morale'

fields.name: holderBirthName
fields.label: Holder — birth name (NOM DE NAISSANCE)
fields.sourceRef: TITULAIRE — 'NOM DE NAISSANCE et PRÉNOM ou RAISON SOCIALE pour une personne morale'

fields.name: holderGivenNames
fields.label: Holder — given name(s) (PRÉNOM)
fields.sourceRef: TITULAIRE — 'NOM DE NAISSANCE et PRÉNOM ou RAISON SOCIALE pour une personne morale'

fields.name: holderCompanyName
fields.label: Holder — company name (RAISON SOCIALE)
fields.sourceRef: TITULAIRE — 'NOM DE NAISSANCE et PRÉNOM ou RAISON SOCIALE pour une personne morale'

fields.name: holderPlaceOfBirthCommune
fields.label: Holder — place of birth: commune
fields.description: French birth commune, when born in France.

fields.name: holderPlaceOfBirthDepartment
fields.label: Holder — place of birth: département
fields.description: French administrative département of birth, when born in France.

fields.name: holderAddressStreetNumberExtension
fields.label: Holder address — street number extension (bis, ter...)

fields.name: holderAddressStreetType
fields.label: Holder address — street type (avenue, rue, etc.)

fields.name: holderAddressLocality
fields.label: Holder address — locality (lieu-dit / BP), if different from the commune
fields.sourceRef: TITULAIRE — Domicile: 'Lieu-dit / BP / Localité (si différente de la commune)'

fields.name: hasCoHolder
fields.label: Is there more than one holder (multi-propriété)?
fields.description: Gates the CO-TITULAIRE block. The form additionally asks for a headcount when more than two people jointly hold the certificate; only one co-holder's identity fits on this page, so 3+ joint holders require a supplementary annex not modelled here — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: 'Dans le cas de multi-propriété, veuillez indiquer le nombre de personnes titulaires du certificat d'immatriculation'

fields.name: multiOwnerCount
fields.label: Number of joint holders (if multi-propriété)
fields.sourceRef: 'Dans le cas de multi-propriété, veuillez indiquer le nombre de personnes titulaires du certificat d'immatriculation'

fields.name: coHolderEntityType
fields.label: CO-TITULAIRE (co-holder) — applicant type
fields.description: personne_physique = a private individual or sole proprietor (entreprise individuelle); personne_morale = a company or other legal entity.
fields.sourceRef: CO-TITULAIRE (co-holder) — 'Personne physique ou entreprise individuelle' / 'Personne morale'

fields.name: coHolderSex
fields.label: CO-TITULAIRE (co-holder) — sex
fields.description: Printed as 'Sexe : M / F' on the form, asked only for a personne physique.

fields.name: coHolderSiret
fields.label: CO-TITULAIRE (co-holder) — SIRET number, if applicable
fields.description: France's 14-digit business establishment identifier (SIRET). The form marks this 'le cas échéant' (as applicable) even for a personne physique operating as an entreprise individuelle.

fields.name: coHolderBirthName
fields.label: CO-TITULAIRE (co-holder) — birth name (NOM DE NAISSANCE)
fields.description: Legal birth surname, for a personne physique.
fields.sourceRef: CO-TITULAIRE (co-holder) — 'NOM DE NAISSANCE et PRÉNOM ou RAISON SOCIALE pour une personne morale'

fields.name: coHolderGivenNames
fields.label: CO-TITULAIRE (co-holder) — given name(s) (PRÉNOM)
fields.description: Given name(s), for a personne physique.
fields.sourceRef: CO-TITULAIRE (co-holder) — 'NOM DE NAISSANCE et PRÉNOM ou RAISON SOCIALE pour une personne morale'

fields.name: coHolderCompanyName
fields.label: CO-TITULAIRE (co-holder) — company name (RAISON SOCIALE)
fields.description: Registered company/legal-entity name, for a personne morale.
fields.sourceRef: CO-TITULAIRE (co-holder) — 'NOM DE NAISSANCE et PRÉNOM ou RAISON SOCIALE pour une personne morale'

fields.name: coHolderUsualName
fields.label: CO-TITULAIRE (co-holder) — usual name (NOM D'USAGE), optional
fields.description: Optional married/usual name, distinct from the legal birth name, e.g. a spouse's name adopted in daily use.

fields.name: lessorEntityType
fields.label: LOUEUR (lessor) — applicant type
fields.description: personne_physique = a private individual or sole proprietor; personne_morale = a company or other legal entity. Applies to any rental or crédit-bail arrangement.
fields.sourceRef: LOUEUR (en cas de location ou crédit-bail) — 'Personne physique ou entreprise individuelle' / 'Personne morale'

fields.name: lessorBirthName
fields.label: LOUEUR — birth name (NOM DE NAISSANCE)
fields.sourceRef: LOUEUR — 'NOM DE NAISSANCE et PRÉNOM ou RAISON SOCIALE'

fields.name: lessorGivenNames
fields.label: LOUEUR — given name(s) (PRÉNOM)
fields.sourceRef: LOUEUR — 'NOM DE NAISSANCE et PRÉNOM ou RAISON SOCIALE'

fields.name: lessorCompanyName
fields.label: LOUEUR — company name (RAISON SOCIALE)
fields.sourceRef: LOUEUR — 'NOM DE NAISSANCE et PRÉNOM ou RAISON SOCIALE pour une personne morale'

fields.name: lessorAddressStreetNumberExtension
fields.label: LOUEUR (lessor) address — street number extension (bis, ter...)

fields.name: lessorAddressStreetType
fields.label: LOUEUR (lessor) address — street type (avenue, rue, etc.)

fields.name: lessorAddressLocality
fields.label: LOUEUR (lessor) address — locality (lieu-dit / BP), if different from the commune
fields.sourceRef: LOUEUR (lessor) — Domicile: 'Lieu-dit / BP / Localité (si différente de la commune)'

fields.name: lesseeEntityType
fields.label: LOCATAIRE (lessee) — applicant type
fields.description: Applies only when the rental arrangement is long-term (location longue durée) or a finance lease (crédit-bail) — not for short-term rental.
fields.sourceRef: LOCATAIRE (en cas de location longue durée ou crédit-bail) — 'Personne physique ou entreprise individuelle' / 'Personne morale'

fields.name: lesseeBirthName
fields.label: LOCATAIRE — birth name (NOM DE NAISSANCE)
fields.sourceRef: LOCATAIRE — 'NOM DE NAISSANCE et PRÉNOM ou RAISON SOCIALE'

fields.name: lesseeGivenNames
fields.label: LOCATAIRE — given name(s) (PRÉNOM)
fields.sourceRef: LOCATAIRE — 'NOM DE NAISSANCE et PRÉNOM ou RAISON SOCIALE'

fields.name: lesseeCompanyName
fields.label: LOCATAIRE — company name (RAISON SOCIALE)
fields.sourceRef: LOCATAIRE — 'NOM DE NAISSANCE et PRÉNOM ou RAISON SOCIALE pour une personne morale'

fields.name: lesseeAddressStreetNumberExtension
fields.label: LOCATAIRE (lessee) address — street number extension (bis, ter...)

fields.name: lesseeAddressStreetType
fields.label: LOCATAIRE (lessee) address — street type (avenue, rue, etc.)

fields.name: lesseeAddressLocality
fields.label: LOCATAIRE (lessee) address — locality (lieu-dit / BP), if different from the commune
fields.sourceRef: LOCATAIRE (lessee) — Domicile: 'Lieu-dit / BP / Localité (si différente de la commune)'

fields.name: optOutOfCommercialDataReuse
fields.label: I object to my personal data being reused for commercial prospecting
fields.sourceRef: 'Je m'oppose à la réutilisation de mes données personnelles à des fins de prospection commerciale** : Oui / Non'

fields.name: titleDeliveryMethod
fields.label: How should the certificate be sent?
fields.sourceRef: 'Mode d'expédition du titre : Voie postale / Retrait à l'Imprimerie Nationale'

fields.name: titleRecipient
fields.label: Who receives the certificate?
fields.description: Selects the party the certificate is delivered to — distinct from `titleDeliveryMethod`, which only selects how (postal vs. pickup). Only meaningful values are `lessor`/`lessee` when a LOUEUR/LOCATAIRE block exists on this application; see `crossFieldValidation`.
fields.sourceRef: 'Le titulaire / Le loueur / Le locataire' (checkbox row printed directly beneath 'Mode d'expédition du titre')

documents.label: Proof of identity
documents.issuingAuthority: Any accepted French/EU government identity document
documents.sourceRef: service-public.fr — 'Documents à préparer: ... Justificatif d'identité ... si le demandeur est une personne physique'

documents.label: Extrait KBis (company registration extract)
documents.sourceRef: service-public.fr — 'Documents à préparer: ... extrait KBis ... si le demandeur est une personne morale'

documents.label: Existing vehicle registration certificate (certificat d'immatriculation), when one already exists
Signed, dated form
documents.sourceRef: Form footer — 'Fait à : ... Le : ...' / 'Signature :' (and, for a company, the name/capacity of the signatory and company seal)

steps.title: What you are requesting, and the current certificate
Co-holder (co-titulaire), if there is more than one holder
Lessor (loueur), if the vehicle is rented or leased
Lessee (locataire), for long-term rental or crédit-bail
